name: Kofu
rules: Put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you put 2 cards on the bottom of your deck in this way, draw 4 cards. (If you can't put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck, you can't use this card.) | You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
